proposed.title: Digital Rights Expansion — Privacy & Surveillance
proposed.summary: Amends Article III to codify a right to encryption, data minimisation, and transparent AI governance by design across all public services.

proposed.title: Quorum Threshold Modernisation
proposed.summary: Adjusts quorum definitions in Article IV for remote attendance, async deliberation, and quorum verification via reproducible signatures.

proposed.title: Protocol Upgrade Obligation
proposed.summary: Creates a binding 90-day window for compliance with ratified protocol upgrades codified through charter amendment.

proposed.title: Environment & Climate Duty Clause
proposed.summary: Adds an Article IX.1 duty to minimise energy intensity and report emissions for all digital infrastructure operated by or for Aetheria.

ratified.title: Founding Preamble Clarification
ratified.summary: Updated preamble to reference the PRINCIPALITY naming convention and SOVEREIGN BY CODE motto. Ratified at inaugural Assembly vote.

ratified.title: Dispute Resolution Cascade Addition
ratified.summary: Amended Article VII to add facilitation layer before formal mediation, reducing unresolved arbitration load by 60%.

ratified.title: Compliance Reaffirmation Timeline
ratified.summary: Set a 12-month compliance review cycle in Article VIII with automated reminder and remediation-plan deadlines.
